action_set_definitions.name: get_learner_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a student, providing mastery levels, engagement score, and fatigue level.

learner_id.description: The unique identifier for the student.

action_set_definitions.name: search_curriculum_modules
action_set_definitions.description: Queries available content based on category and a specific difficulty range to ensure a gradual learning curve.

min_difficulty.description: The lower bound of difficulty (0.0 to 1.0).

max_difficulty.description: The upper bound of difficulty (0.0 to 1.0) to prevent over-challenging.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_lesson
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns the curriculum module to the student and updates the environment state based on the interaction.

learner_id.description: The unique identifier for the student.

content_id.description: The ID of the module to be executed.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_rest_recovery
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates a rest period to reduce the student's fatigue level.

learner_id.description: The unique identifier for the student.

state_description.mastery_map: A mapping of topic names to mastery levels (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.engagement_score: Current level of learner motivation and focus (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.fatigue_level: Accumulated mental exhaustion; affects performance probability (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.attempt_history: List of the last 5 content IDs encountered and the results.
